overall.description: Game engine footage from the bridge of a vessel navigating through stormy seas at night. The view shows the ship's bow cutting through rough waters while radar and navigation displays are visible overhead, with occasional lightning illuminating the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating coastal waters during thunderstorm

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the left side of the stormy sky
lightning strike visible ahead on the horizon over the ocean

agents.ego_description: navigating the ship through rough stormy seas from the bridge, monitoring the rotating radar and navigation chart displays

entered.detail: left display showing nautical chart with colored depth contours and land masses
center circular display with rotating yellow radar sweep showing surrounding contacts
right display showing vessel telemetry and systems data on blue background
bow of the ship with metal railings and red deck plating visible through the forward windows
rough dark water with visible waves and whitecaps under heavy storm clouds

segments.scene_description: Inside the ship's bridge looking forward through large windows at the bow cutting through stormy seas. Three navigation displays are mounted overhead showing charts, active radar with rotating sweep, and systems data. The vessel moves steadily through rough waters as lightning occasionally flashes in the dark sky ahead, illuminating the turbulent ocean surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady forward perspective from the ship's bridge as it navigates a turbulent, storm-lashed ocean under a dark night sky. It begins with a view through the large bridge windows, focusing on the bow as it cuts through rough, churning waters. As the vessel pushes forward, the camera captures the glow of three overhead navigation displays showing active radar sweeps and system charts. The scene then shifts in intensity as intermittent flashes of lightning illuminate the horizon, momentarily revealing the scale of the turbulent ocean surface ahead.
